title: macrorhamnus faraloatra subsp. glabrescens
intro: Macrorhamnus faraloatra subsp. glabrescens, also known as the Chinese paperbush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Macrorhamnus faraloatra subsp. glabrescens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent to combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
